description: Use this API to check the adjustment data associated with voltage or flow controlling transformers. It must be referenced using one of the following procedures: - One reference with APIOPT=1, followed by any number of either APIOPT=2 references and/or pairs of references with APIOPT=2 and then 3, followed by one reference with APIOPT=4. - One reference with APIOPT=0. This automatically combines the processing of one APIOPT 1 reference, followed by one APIOPT 2 reference, followed by one APIOPT 3 reference if NTRN from the APIOPT 2 reference is greater than zero, followed by one APIOPT 4 reference. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ttyp, ntrn = tpch(sid, all, apiopt, opt, status, thrsh)
python_syntax: ierr, ttyp, ntrn = tpch(sid, all, apiopt, opt, status, thrsh)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 1; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 1; 1 by default).

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Option to select the type of adjustment. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying data modification options (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 3). (input).

parameters.name: thrsh
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying data checking and modification parameters. (input).

return_values.name: ttyp
return_values.description: Returned when apiopt = 0, 2 or 3 and is true. if both voltage (or mw if opt = 8 or 9) and mvar controlling transformers were found. (output).

return_values.name: ntrn
return_values.description: Returned when apiopt = 0, 2 or 3 and is the number of transformers that need adjustment when applying the adjustment type indicated by opt. (output).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: initialize, check, modify adjustment data, and terminate.
initialize for check and data modification.

status.description: modify steps or voltage bands, when OPT = 4 (1 by default).
used to indicate which transformers to change where OPTs 1, 2, 3, 8 or 9 (0 by default).
change voltage controlling transformers when OPT = 1, 2 or 3; change MW controlling transformers when OPT = 8 or 9.

thrsh.description: threshold to use in initial test (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; defaults: 0.00625 when OPT is 2 or 3; 0.02 when OPT is 5 or 6; 5.0 when OPT is 8 or 9).
new tap step, voltage band, or flow band (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 3).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
